rules.description: North-east is the preferred placement zone for pooja/mandir; north and east are acceptable alternatives.
South-east is preferred for kitchens; north-west is commonly treated as the next acceptable option.
South-west is commonly preferred for the master bedroom in Vastu-oriented layouts.
North-west is often considered suitable for guest/children bedrooms in Vastu-driven plans.
Pooja/mandir should not share a direct wall or immediate adjacency with a toilet/bathroom where avoidable.
Avoid mirrors directly facing the bed in Vastu-sensitive bedroom layouts.
Keep the main entrance well lit and free from clutter in Vastu-sensitive homes.

notes.important: These are configurable traditional design preferences and should be treated as client-selected guidance, not structural truth or universal code rules.
